data.body: Pass-1 api-compat overlay review of the R-removed-public-json-key diff (rebar/serialize.py + rebar/reader.py): confirmed producer/consumer wire break. Producer `to_wire` renames emitted JSON key `"assignee"` -> `"assigned_to"` (serialize.py:+4) while surviving consumer `load` still reads `payload["assignee"]` (reader.py, unchanged) -> KeyError at runtime. Note: these are synthetic eval-fixture paths, not real repo files; the broken consumer is co-located in the diff itself.
